fields.if_the_resp_was_under_obligation_as: Terminal RR Assn of St. Louis (Note 1)
Note 1: Terminal Railroad Association of St. Louis Mortgage Bonds are fully funded by TRRA through a sinking fund established
with a balance in the amount of approximately $20,247 thousand as of December 31, 2013.  This fund covers future interest and
principal payments through the remainder of the bonds term.

fields.disclosure_text: GTC, GTW, ICRR and WCL have access to Cdn. $800,000 thousand of the credit facility discussed in schedule 501. The maximum amount of outstanding borrowings during 2013 was nil. As at December 31, 2013, there were no outstanding borrowings on the credit facility, Cdn. $404,545 thousand and U.S. $72,086 thousand of letters of credit drawn under the bilateral facilities discussed in schedule 501. The Companies do not have any compensating balances.
